hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" .md); [ "$BASENAME" = '.proofs' ] || [ "$BASENAME" = '.claude' ] || [ "$BASENAME" = '.codex' ] && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Cannot overwrite .proofs, .claude, or .codex — these are directories."}' && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '[/\\]\.claude[/\\]rules[/\\].*\.md$|[/\\]\.codex[/\\]rules[/\\]agent-proofs\.rules$' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"proofd generated rule files are refreshed by python tools/proofd.py sync; use proofd mutation commands instead of editing them directly."}' || true
npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -qE "error TS[0-9]+" && echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"TypeScript errors introduced — fix before continuing.\"}" || echo "{}"
